name: Banana Orange Raisin Bread
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Raisins or Chopped Dried Figs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 9 x 5-inch loaf pan with non-stick cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, combine dry ingredients: flour, wheat germ, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt (if using). Mix well.
4. Add egg, egg whites, vegetable oil, mashed bananas, orange juice, grated orange peel, and vanilla to the dry ingredients. Mix just until moistened.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 60 to 70 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the bread to cool for 10 minutes before removing it from the pan. Cool completely before serving.
